verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Trust, trust in the Lord Lean not on your own understanding In all, all of your ways Acknowledge Him He'll make your path straight

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You'll be my God for life I'll walk by Your side With Your hand in mine I'll go where You lead me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My eyes can only see The grounds beneath my feet Your dreams are greater Your ways are higher O Lord, please show me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Bless my thoughts My dreams, my imaginations Step by step Your delight, Your creation
